title: Solid Powder Blue Short Fold Rectangular Plastic Table Cover (137cm x 274cm) 1 Count - Elegant & Durable Tablecloth for Parties, Events, and Home Use
features: ELEGANT POWDER BLUE DESIGN: Grace your party, event, or home setting with this beautiful solid powder blue rectangular plastic table cover, adding a touch of sophistication and style to any occasion just with a single vibrant piece.

PREMIUM QUALITY & DURABLE: Made from high-quality plastic material, this tablecloth ensures long-lasting use, providing excellent protection for your table surfaces while maintaining its stylish appearance.

PERFECTLY SIZED: Measuring 137cm x 274cm, our versatile rectangular table cover comfortably fits most standard rectangle tables, serving as an ideal option for a wide variety of events and gatherings.

1 COUNT PACK: Enjoy a great value with this pack containing one powder blue rectangular plastic table cover, making it an ideal choice for those looking to add an elegant touch to their occasion without breaking the bank.

EFFORTLESS CLEANUP & SETUP: Experience the convenience of a hassle-free event – our elegant and durable tablecloth is easy to deploy, wipe down, and fold away, ensuring your party, event, or home dining experience remains stress-free and enjoyable.
description: From the manufacturer What make us Unique? We have over half of a century of industry experience. From the beginning, our commitment to providing high-quality products at cost-effective prices has made us a standout among the leading party supply manufacturers. Our ever-evolving catalog of party supplies includes the hottest party themes, and both trendy and classic party items like balloons, tableware, piñatas, favors, and more!
